3286140.name: Providentia Academy
3286140.description:
Providentia Academy is a captivating 2D visual novel that immerses players in a world of mystery, romance, and supernatural intrigue. Set within the prestigious walls of Providentia Academy, players will follow the story of a talented student who unravels the academy's hidden secrets.

As players navigate through the story, they'll make choices that shape the protagonist's relationships, influence the plot, and determine the ultimate fate of the academy. With stunning visuals, evocative music, and a compelling narrative, Providentia Academy offers a unique and unforgettable gaming experience.

This is only the first chapter and not the full game. It serves as an introduction to a longer story, although it's still uncertain if we're going to continue this project. This game is a student project created in a period of 9 weeks.

Credits:

Made by GEOMS Entertainment

  • Saku Raitanen - Product Owner, Design, Narrative

  • Essi Pirttivaara - Technology, Scrum Master, Producing & Publishing

  • Gabriel Nwaoha - Audio, Implementation, Producing & Publishing

  • Mairiin Kask - Art, Business

  • Oliver Valtonen - Art, Q&A

Special thanks to: Tero Korpela - Technology
